# FFERR_INCOMPLETEEFFECT | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_INCOMPLETEEFFECT ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_incompleteeffect)

-  FFERR_INCOMPLETEEFFECT 

Global Variable# FFERR_INCOMPLETEEFFECT

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_INCOMPLETEEFFECT: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_incompleteeffect#Discussion)

The effect could not be downloaded because essential information is missing. For example, no axes have been associated with the effect, or no type-specific information has been created.
